title: Gesture-Controlled Smart Home
description: Real-time gesture recognition system using computer vision to control Arduino-based home automation hardware via webcam and serial communication.
overview: A real-time gesture recognition system that uses computer vision to control Arduino-based home automation hardware. Hand gestures captured via webcam are recognized and translated into control signals transmitted to Arduino over serial communication, triggering physical actions in the home environment.

features.label: Real-Time Gesture Recognition
features.description: Webcam-based hand gesture recognition with low-latency processing.

features.label: Arduino Home Automation
features.description: Hardware control triggered by recognized gestures.

features.label: Multi-Gesture Support
features.description: Multiple gesture types supported with noise filtering.

features.label: Low-Latency Response
features.description: Optimized pipeline for real-time control response.

algorithms.name: Gesture Recognition
algorithms.description: Computer vision pipeline for hand gesture detection and classification.

algorithms.name: Noise Filtering
algorithms.description: Signal processing to eliminate false positives in gesture detection.

modules.name: Hardware Controller
modules.responsibility: Arduino-side signal processing and device control

results: Multi-gesture vocabulary with reliable noise filtering
